tasks.name: N3: Top-Schematic closure with digital port connections

comments.text:
Hi @KiritkumarP:
Hi Sumon Bose, 
Please find top level connection path:
/home/ArchismanGhosh/CC/QS223_Archisman_model/QS223_TOP_SUMON_24thNOV
In general most of the connections are okay. But please do check. It is quite easy for me to miss as this is my 1st time and few signal naming is really confusing. Sometime timezone works against me in clarifying the signals. 
Some of the PS signals (specificallly status ones) are not super clear to me. please check and let me know. 
Sayantan Dey there is a really confusing naming pattern related to spi_addr<5:0> between mem_controller, fifo, and PS... There are signals like spi_addr, spi_addr_final, spui_addr_to_controller etc. Please double check those and let me know. I see similar things are followed from 222. Please clarify this over chat or with Sumon da once. 
Please let me know if anything else is missing. Sorry for the delay, I was a bit occupied in all other tasks as you know. 
 Please let me know if you have any question
It is done from my side
comments.author: Archisman Ghosh

tasks.blockerReason:
Delay Reason @pm:
1. Summary: Delay due to unclear signal naming conventions and missing PS signals.
2. Technical: Confusing naming patterns for spi_addr<5:0> between mem_controller, fifo, and PS, and insufficient clarification on PS signals.

tasks.name: QS223 CUSTOM LAYOUT

comments.text:
Kirit: Delay reason 
1) While designing the UWB filter, we had to do a couple of iterations to meet the bandwidth requirements. 
2) We changed the LPF layout a few times to reduce parasitics onthe  LPF o/p node. We had to bring RSSI and AGC i/p close to the LPF output to reduce the parasitic cap. 
3) UWB Clock buffer: We changed the clock buffer layout a few times to meet the delay requirements. 
4) We had to modify the integrator to meet the CDR PLL 320MHz requirements 
5) There was a change in BR_mixer and BR LPF design 
6) Added source follower at the output of ED and LPF 
7) Changed floor plan many times to meet the top-level routing requirements and optimize the critical signal path. (We brought BE_top closer to the ED o/p and SS_top closer to the LPF/ED o/p. 
8) There was a change in the Spectrum sensor design.
comments.author: KiritkumarP

comments.text: Testing automation comments are working with task @Avik Majumder
comments.author: Pushpal Das

tasks.blockerReason:
Delay Reason @pm:
1. Summary: The task was delayed due to multiple design iterations and changes to meet various requirements.
2. Technical: Design iterations for UWB filter, LPF layout, clock buffer, CDR PLL, BR_mixer, and Spectrum sensor designs.

comments.text:
Kirit: Delay reason 
1) While designing the UWB filter, we had to do a couple of iterations to meet the bandwidth requirements. 
2) We changed the LPF layout a few times to reduce parasitics onthe  LPF o/p node. We had to bring RSSI and AGC i/p close to the LPF output to reduce the parasitic cap. 
3) UWB Clock buffer: We changed the clock buffer layout a few times to meet the delay requirements. 
4) We had to modify the integrator to meet the CDR PLL 320MHz requirements 
5) There was a change in BR_mixer and BR LPF design 
6) Added source follower at the output of ED and LPF 
7) Changed floor plan many times to meet the top-level routing requirements and optimize the critical signal path. (We brought BE_top closer to the ED o/p and SS_top closer to the LPF/ED o/p. 
8) There was a change in the Spectrum sensor design.
comments.author: KiritkumarP
